title: Strategic Game Decision Flow
description: A visual representation of the core components and decision-making process in a strategic game, showing how players, strategies, and payoffs interact to form a Nash Equilibrium.
relationships: Players choose from their set of Strategies
The combination of chosen Strategies determines the Payoff for each player
A player's Best Response is the strategy that yields the highest payoff given other players' strategies
A Nash Equilibrium is reached when all players are playing a Best Response to each other's strategies
